sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Lemmings 2

special_mechanics.name: Runner
special_mechanics.description: Skill that enhances lemming mobility to overcome obstacles

special_mechanics.name: Icarus Wings
special_mechanics.description: Skill that enhances lemming mobility, enables flight/gliding

special_mechanics.name: Builder
special_mechanics.description: Skill that adds terrain to levels, creating crossings and barriers

special_mechanics.name: Planter
special_mechanics.description: Skill that adds terrain to levels

special_mechanics.name: Miner
special_mechanics.description: Skill that removes terrain from levels

special_mechanics.name: Bazooker
special_mechanics.description: Skill that removes terrain from levels

special_mechanics.name: Blocker
special_mechanics.description: Skill that alters behavior of neighboring lemmings, prevents movement

special_mechanics.name: Attractor
special_mechanics.description: Skill that alters behavior of neighboring lemmings

special_mechanics.name: Ballooner
special_mechanics.description: Skill affected by fan tool, provides lift/hovering

special_mechanics.name: Fan Tool
special_mechanics.description: Player-controlled tool that propels lemmings with relevant skills and powers mechanisms

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article which focuses on gameplay mechanics, narrative, and development rather than precise physics parameters. No technical documentation of movement physics, gravity, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel systems found in available source. Individual lemming movement is autonomous based on assigned skills rather than direct player control.
